<td id="Card16137464" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href16137464" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADD5GK2VRTMUSLQ3FIA6PEIYNUPMK5EGZYL3EBTDO4XMRW4ZS7IS46XQUWKRNGYSAA2KIVRKQNOMV4IRS5J2TLZLQG6QADFWQIMJHTDD2B2SCOPKVRS27QPQWAK5MZYOHWVQYJDLDC7CWCGCF2XEMP35I42VZ5RB24IKB5MHRGF6VQCWGPV64&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title16137464" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href16137464" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADW4MDZL7EVAVLWXPJWVBAMU4L2BB7K2S66FPYUPHVWAPXRCIBU5MZUN6WJCGDPYL6FQ7V7ZCR7I5NLXHSUUBACTRVE7UK55HMEGVL2PJST6XVUNWEHKHHDZXB5X6LFFSDPUGPJZNVLWI7N7SN4UZHWVKJNMJFC6IH3K52CQZDX76CRB4SL6B&" target="_blank">
                        Largest Covid Vaccine Study Yet Finds Links to Health Conditions
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
